texto: The German pilot had come up and was standing by smiling as Mr. Parker Pyne finished answering a long interrogation which he had not understood."What have I said?" he asked of the German"That your father's Christian name is Tourist, that your profession is Charles, that the maiden name of your mother is Baghdad, and that you have come from Harriet.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Agath Christie que provoca temas ligados a familia. Ao questionar “The German pilot had come up and was standing by smiling as Mr. Parker Pyne finished answering a …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, british-humor, mystery, com foco em mystery.

frase_original: The German pilot had come up and was standing by smiling as Mr. Parker Pyne finished answering a long interrogation which he had not understood."What have I said?" he asked of the German"That your father's Christian name is Tourist, that your profession is Charles, that the maiden name of your mother is Baghdad, and that you have come from Harriet.
